# analyze-github-repos
Description: Analyze a list of GitHub repositories to audit their structure, tech stack, workflows, and overall health.
Source: project
1. Provide a list of GitHub repository URLs for analysis.
2. The system will process each repository in parallel, examining its structure, tech stack, workflows, deployment configuration, and overall health.
3. Once the analysis is complete, prompt the system again to retrieve the consolidated audit.
4. The system will then present an audit detailing what aspects are healthy, what needs attention, and what might be missing across all specified repositories.
